commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `historyRenderLimit` path for chat item building, starts large Control UI histories with a 30-message render window, expands in batches, and adds focused jsdom tests.

PR surface: Source +164, Tests +171. Total +335 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible with medium confidence: current main loads the 100-message chat history tail and passes the full loaded array through `buildChatItems`, but I did not reproduce the 8-10s browser delay live.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real-behavior proof, blocked validation, and merge refresh rather than a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Render dashboard chat history incrementally
target.body:
Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/87345

## User-facing bug
Switching dashboard chat sessions could synchronously rebuild the full 100-message UI history window, causing 8-10s switches on long or heavy transcripts.

## Exact repro
1. Open the Control UI chat dashboard.
2. Use or select a session whose `chat.history` returns the current 100-message tail.
3. Switch between dashboard sessions.
4. Before: the chat view can block while all loaded history items are built and rendered at once.
5. After: newly loaded large histories start with the latest 30-message render window, expand in 30-message batches when the user is at the top, avoid programmatic bottom-scroll expansion, and auto-fill non-scrollable initial windows while preserving bottom anchoring.

## Fix summary
- Added optional `historyRenderLimit` to `buildChatItems`, preserving existing default 100-message behavior.
- Added per-session render-window state in `renderChat` so newly loaded large histories initially render 30 messages.
- Expand the render window on top scroll or exact top state, skip bottom auto-scrolls inside the top threshold, and auto-fill after render when the initial window does not overflow.
- Keep auto-filled windows anchored to latest messages via the existing `onScrollToBottom` path.
- Search with a non-empty query still renders the full loaded and capped history window.

## Targeted tests

- `buildChatItems` coverage proves the render limit preserves the newest window.
- Chat view tests cover initial 30-message windows, top-scroll expansion, bottom-scroll suppression, auto-fill, and full rendering while searching.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Switching to a large dashboard chat history no longer forces an immediate 100-message render; the UI starts with a latest-message window and expands incrementally.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on branch `fix/dashboard-session-switching`, commit `16fc1330`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_HEARTBEAT_MS=10000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --run --maxWorkers 1 ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts -t "chat history render window"` (5 passed | 90 skipped)
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_HEARTBEAT_MS=10000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs --run --maxWorkers 1 ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts` (95 passed)
- `codex review --base origin/main` passed after resolving review findings.

Evidence after fix:
- Focused render-window Vitest passed: 5 passed, 90 skipped.
- Broader UI chat Vitest passed: 95 passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- `codex review --base origin/main` passed after resolving review findings.

Observed result after fix: Newly loaded large histories render the newest 30 messages first, expand in 30-message batches from top-scroll/top state, avoid bottom auto-scroll expansion, and still render full loaded history for non-empty search.

What was not tested: `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` and `node scripts/check-changed.mjs` could not complete because both invoke `pnpm install`; sandbox got npm `ENOTFOUND`, and the escalated retry hit Darwin optional package download `error (23) The operation was aborted due to timeout`. Direct `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo` could not run because `node_modules/.bin/tsgo` was missing after the blocked install. No browser screenshot or video was captured; this PR changes render-window behavior and is covered with jsdom view tests, not visual layout changes.

## Not tested / known gaps
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` and `node scripts/check-changed.mjs` could not complete because both invoke `pnpm install`; sandbox got npm `ENOTFOUND`, and the escalated retry hit Darwin optional package download `error (23) The operation was aborted due to timeout`.
- Direct `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-ui.tsbuildinfo` could not run because `node_modules/.bin/tsgo` was missing after the blocked install.
- No browser screenshot or video captured; this PR changes render-window behavior and is covered with jsdom view tests, not visual layout changes.

## AI-assisted disclosure
Prepared with AI assistance in Codex. I reviewed the diff, ran targeted tests, and resolved codex review findings before opening.
